question: Does the response provide exactly 3 distinct living room layout plans as requested?
Does each of the 3 layout plans include a corresponding 3D rendered image?
Does the text explicitly annotate key furniture dimensions (e.g., sofa length, cabinet depth) for each of the 3 plans?
Does each plan include both an analysis of 'pros and cons' and a specification of 'suitable household types'?
Does the text describe specific storage solutions (e.g., full-wall cabinets, built-ins) for each plan to meet the 'adequate storage' requirement?
Do the generated images visually reflect the requested 'Nordic style' (e.g., light wood, neutral tones, minimalist aesthetic)?
Do the 3D rendered images realistically portray the spatial proportions of a compact 18-square-meter room, avoiding unrealistically spacious depictions?
Are the furniture dimensions and layout constraints described in the text practically implementable in an 18-square-meter room (e.g., avoiding oversized furniture)?
Do the 3 plans demonstrate meaningful layout variations (e.g., changing sofa configuration or furniture orientation) rather than just cosmetic changes?
Does the furniture arrangement shown in each image match the specific layout described in its adjacent text (e.g., L-shaped sofa in text appears as L-shaped in image)?
Do the generated images visually depict the storage solutions mentioned in the text (e.g., visible cabinets or shelving units)?
Do the generated images provide meaningful spatial information (e.g., showing furniture placement relative to walls) rather than being generic close-ups?
Are the 3D rendered images free from obvious AI artifacts (e.g., distorted geometry, floating objects) and of high visual clarity?
Is each 3D image placed immediately adjacent to the text description of that specific plan?
